title: T-028 — Adjustment service + 10% threshold gate
prompt:
# T-028 — Adjustment service + 10% threshold gate

PRD: `05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md` §8.5 (FR-WH-014), V-WH-MOV-004/005.
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`.

## Goal
`adjustLp(lpId, newQty, reasonCode, reasonText?)` Server Action with 10% delta threshold routing to manager approval queue.

## Implementation contract
`apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/lp-adjustment.ts`. Validate reason_code present. If |delta|/LP.qty > 0.10 OR delta > 0 (qty increase), insert into `movement_approvals` with status='pending' rather than applying directly. Otherwise apply: update LP.qty, insert stock_moves(move_type='adjustment'), insert lp_genealogy(operation_type='adjustment'). On final-zero qty, status→'consumed'. New table `movement_approvals` (id, tenant_id, lp_id, requested_qty, delta, reason_code, reason_text, requested_by, requested_at, approved_by, approved_at, status enum pending/approved/rejected).

## Files (scope)
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/lp-adjustment.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/movement-approvals.ts [create]
- packages/db/migrations/0NN_movement_approvals.sql [create]
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/__tests__/lp-adjustment.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given LP qty=100 and adjust to 95 (5% delta) by Operator, when service runs, then qty=95 immediately and a stock_moves(adjustment) row exists.
2. Given LP qty=100 and adjust to 80 (20% delta), when service runs, then movement_approvals row pending=true is created and LP.qty stays 100.
3. Given LP qty=100 and adjust to 110 (qty increase), when service runs, then movement_approvals row is created regardless of percentage.
4. Given missing reason_code, when service runs, then V-WH-MOV-005 validation error returns.

## Test strategy
- RED: lp-adjustment.test.ts covers four scenarios + new schema.
- Run `pnpm --filter web test lp-adjustment`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not auto-approve >10% deltas.
- Do not allow qty increase without approval.
- Do not delete LP at qty=0 (audit-preserving).

pipeline_inputs.description: LP adjustment with 10% delta threshold and qty-increase always-approval; new movement_approvals table.
pipeline_inputs.details: Single transaction. New table movement_approvals; reason_code required; LP qty=0 → status='consumed' (no delete).
acceptance_criteria: Given LP.qty=100, adjust to 95 by Operator, when run, then qty=95 immediately and adjustment stock_move exists
Given LP.qty=100, adjust to 80, when run, then a pending movement_approvals row is created and LP.qty stays 100
Given LP.qty=100, adjust to 110, when run, then a pending movement_approvals row is created
Given missing reason_code, when run, then V-WH-MOV-005 error returns
test_strategy: RED: lp-adjustment.test.ts covers four scenarios + new table
risk_red_lines: Do not allow qty increase without approval
Do not delete LP at qty=0
